1020601.name: Before The Tea Cools...
1020601.desc: When attacking a target with a damage type the target is "Weak" or "Fatal" (Resistance>x1) to, gain 1 [Breath] for each [Burst] on target before the attack (Max 20 per turn)

1 ally with the fastest Speed deals more damage based on the target's Rupture when attacking with a damage type that the target is "Fatal"(Resistance>x1.5) to
